allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Nome:', d['name'], '| ID:', d['id'], '| Species URL:', d['species']['url'], '| Tipo:', d['types'][0]['type']['name'], '| Tipo URL:', d['types'][0]['type']['url']\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '$in=$input|Out-String; $o=$in|ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host '\\''Nome:'\\'' $o.name '\\''| ID:'\\'' $o.id '\\''| SpeciesURL:'\\'' $o.species.url '\\''| Tipo:'\\'' $o.types[0].type.name '\\''| TipoURL:'\\'' $o.types[0].type.url')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '$in=$input|Out-String; $o=$in|ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host '\\''Habitat:'\\'' $o.habitat.name '\\''| Capture rate:'\\'' $o.capture_rate '\\''| Lendario:'\\'' $o.is_legendary '\\''| Felicidade:'\\'' $o.base_happiness')
